REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER CHRISTOPHER J. KAYE'S MOTION TO UNSEAL RECORDS, ELECTRONIC COURT DOCKET, AND CASE FILE IS GRANTED, IN PART, AND DENIED, IN PART. JUDGMENT, FILED ON JULY 16, 1999, NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, FILED ON JULY 26, 1999, AND THE STATEMENT OF DECISION, FILED ON JUNE 9, 1999, SHALL BE UNSEALED. PETITIONER SHOWED AN OVERRIDING INTEREST IN UNSEALING SPECIFIC DOCUMENTS THAT ARE NOT OVERCOME BY DEFENDANT REGINA DELANEY'S RIGHT TO PRIVACY. MOTION IS DENIED AS TO ALL OTHER FILINGS, WHICH SHALL REMAIN SEALED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. TAUALA; REPORTED: BRIJANNE BYRD; CSR# 14279; (916)642-5856; CSRBRIJANEB@YAHOO.COM

PETITIONER CHRISTOPHER J. KAYE'S MOTION TO UNSEAL RECORDS, ELECTRONIC COURT DOCKET, AND CASE FILE
Off Calendar May-17-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Joshua West (707)552-1100 of Smith Dollar PC appearing via Zoom for other Christopher Kaye.
Aaron Garcia (760)346-3788 of Law Offices of Aaron F. Garcia APLC appearing via Zoom for defendant Regina Delaney
Reporter: Brijanne Byrd; CSR# 14279; (916)642-5856; csrbrijaneb@yahoo.com

Hearing held (See reporter's transcript for full details). Mr. West contests tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CHRISTOPHER J. KAYE'S MOTION TO UNSEAL RECORDS, ELECTRONIC COURT DOCKET, AND CASE FILE

is GRANTED, in part, and DENIED, in part. Judgment, filed on July 16, 1999, Notice of Entry of Judgment, filed on July 26, 1999, and the Statement of Decision, filed on June 9, 1999, shall be unsealed. Petitioner showed an overriding interest in unsealing specific documents that are not overcome by Defendant Regina Delaney's right to privacy. Motion is denied as to all other filings, which shall remain sealed.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Tauala; Reported: Brijanne Byrd; CSR# 14279; (916)642-5856; csrbrijaneb@yahoo.com
